# aaa.arif-fazil.com — THE BODY

**Site:** aaa.arif-fazil.com  
**Ring:** Ring 3 — THE BODY  
**Purpose:** Runtime execution, agents, MCP tools, API surface  

## What This Site Is

The BODY that executes under THE MIND's law. Every tool is a governed syscall.

## Core Content

- MCP runtime at [https://arifosmcp.arif-fazil.com](https://arifosmcp.arif-fazil.com)
- Constitutional tool registry
- GEOX earth physics embedded
- AAA agent protocol

## MCP Server

The MCP server exposes governed tools. Each tool passes F1-F13 before execution.

Tools available:
- `geox_ratlas_lookup` — 99-material earth reference
- `geox_saturation` — Archie saturation calculator
- `geox_porosity` — Density-neutron porosity
- `geox_bulk_density` — Bulk density transform

## For AI Agents

Access the MCP at: `https://arifosmcp.arif-fazil.com/mcp`

Every tool call:
1. Authenticates via API key
2. Passes F1-F13 floor review
3. Logs to Vault999
4. Returns a signed receipt

## Governance

- 888_JUDGE never self-approves
- Human veto always preserved (F13)
- Reversibility required (F1)

## Key Pages

- [MCP Tools](https://arifosmcp.arif-fazil.com/tools) — Full tool registry
- [GEOX Earth](https://geox.arif-fazil.com/) — Physics grounding
- [APEX Theory](https://apex.arif-fazil.com/) — Constitutional text

## Machine Files

- `llms.json` — Structured metadata
- `page.json` — This site's machine summary
- `.well-known/agent.json` — A2A Agent Card
